channel.title: Maventech — Software Product Feed
channel.description: Genuine digital software product keys delivered by email — Microsoft Office, Windows, Bitdefender, Norton, McAfee, Adobe and more. Maventech is an authorized independent reseller of previously-licensed software product keys.

item.g:title: Microsoft Office 2024 Professional Plus (Windows) (Digital Key)
item.g:description: Genuine Microsoft product key for Microsoft Office 2024 Professional Plus (Windows) (Digital Key). Digital delivery by email once the order is verified. One-time purchase, 24/7 support and 30-day money-back guarantee — sold by Maventech, an authorized independent reseller of previously-licensed software product keys.
item.g:product_highlight: Genuine Microsoft license for 1 Windows device
Includes Word, Excel, Powerpoint, Outlook, Access
